<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <title>Minimalist WebGL Lines | CodeTap</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="./style.css">
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="https://codetap.org/assets/img/favicon.png">

</head>

<body>
  <main id="main">
    <header class="h">
    </header>
    <article class="ct">
      <canvas id="gl" role="img" aria-label="WebGL animation showing flowing trails in a circular pattern"
        tabindex="0"></canvas>
    </article>
    <footer>
      <small>✺</small>
    </footer>
  </main>
  <script type="module" src="./script.js"></script>

</body>

</html>
